title: Cleanliness of stock yards, pens, etc.
doc_html:
§482.  Cleanliness of stock yards, pens, etc.

The owners or lessees of all stock yards, loading and unloading pens and places referred to in R.S. 45:481, shall maintain these places in a clean and sanitary condition.
doc_text:
§482.  Cleanliness of stock yards, pens, etc.
The owners or lessees of all stock yards, loading and unloading pens and places referred to in R.S. 45:481, shall maintain these places in a clean and sanitary condition.
